## Epic 6 — Combat & Equipment (#74)

**Dependency:** #70, #73
**Est. Effort:** Large

### Goal
Write chapter 13 — Combat as a complete rules chapter.

### Chapter Structure
1. **Combat Overview** — Fast, cinematic, always-hit philosophy
2. **Initiative** — Determining turn order
3. **The Combat Round** — Turn structure, action economy
4. **Actions in Combat** — Standard, Move, Bonus, Reaction, Free
5. **Making an Attack** — Always-hit procedure, damage determination
6. **Damage and Resistance** — Damage types, vulnerability, resistance
7. **Conditions** — Full condition reference (from #73)
8. **Movement & Positioning** — Grid/ToTM, difficult terrain, cover
9. **Mounted Combat** — Rules for fighting from horseback
10. **Underwater Combat** — Special rules
11. **Healing in Combat** — Stabilizing, healing spells, potions
12. **Dying & Death** — 0 HP rules, death saves (adapt from original PDF's fun dying mechanic)
13. **Combat Examples** — 2-3 full worked combat scenes

### Success Criteria
- Complete combat procedure
- All conditions defined
- Dying mechanic adapted from original
- At least 2 worked combat examples
- Builds without AsciiDoc errors

### Tasks
- [ ] Write combat chapter following structure above
- [ ] Adapt "fun dying mechanic" from original PDF
- [ ] Write worked examples
- [ ] Build and fix errors
- [ ] Cross-reference to: core resolution (ch06), equipment (ch15), armor (ch16)
